title: HTTP Client Integrations

classes.name: HttpClientIntegrationHelper
classes.notes: Checks DD_TRACE_HTTP_CLIENT_ERROR_STATUSES env config; supports single codes and ranges (e.g. '400-499')

classes.name: CurlIntegration
methods: static init(): int  — hooks curl_exec, curl_multi_exec, curl_multi_info_read
static setup_curl_span(SpanData $span): void  — sets name/resource='curl_exec', type=HTTP_CLIENT, service='curl', COMPONENT tag
static set_curl_attributes(SpanData $span, array $info): array  — sanitizes URL, extracts host/path/status, network tags, error detection via HttpClientIntegrationHelper::setClientError()
hooked_functions: curl_multi_exec (prehook: create_stack+start_span; posthook: set_curl_attributes per request)

classes.name: CurlSpanInfo
properties: public array $spans  — list of [curlHandle, SpanData] tuples
methods: __destruct(): void  — finalises multi-exec spans: calls CurlIntegration::set_curl_attributes(), close_span()
classes.notes: Stored in ObjectKVStore keyed by curl_multi handle. Acts as lifecycle manager for curl_multi_exec spans.

classes.name: GuzzleIntegration
methods: static init(): int  — installs hooks on GuzzleHttp\Client::transfer and traces GuzzleHttp\Client::send
static addRequestInfo(SpanData $span, $request): void  — extracts URL, host, HTTP method; supports PSR-7 and Guzzle5 request interfaces
static handlePromiseResponse($response, SpanData $span): void  — handles async promises (fulfilled or pending)
hooked_methods: GuzzleHttp\Client::transfer (prehook: span setup + distributed tracing header injection; posthook: handlePromiseResponse)
GuzzleHttp\Client::send (posthook: addRequestInfo + status code + error detection)
classes.distributed_tracing: Injects DDTrace distributed tracing headers via DDTrace\generate_distributed_tracing_headers() into PSR-7 request on transfer(); calls hook->overrideArguments() unconditionally (JIT safety)

classes.name: Psr18Integration
methods: static addRequestInfo(SpanData $span, $request): void  — extracts host, HTTP method, sanitized URL from PSR-7 request
classes.notes: Post-hook only (no distributed tracing header injection — relies on curl integration below it). Tested via GuzzleIntegration tests.

relationships: CurlIntegration composes CurlSpanInfo (creates and stores in ObjectKVStore)
CurlIntegration uses ObjectKVStore (store span per curl_multi handle, PHP8+)
All integrations use DDTrace\SpanData, DDTrace\Tag, DDTrace\Type
config_env_vars: DD_TRACE_HTTP_CLIENT_SPLIT_BY_DOMAIN — splits service name by hostname
DD_TRACE_HTTP_CLIENT_ERROR_STATUSES — comma-separated codes/ranges for error detection
DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED — flattens service names to root span
key_design_patterns: All init() methods register hooks at runtime and return LOADED or NOT_AVAILABLE
CurlSpanInfo uses destructor pattern for deferred span finalization in async multi-exec
GuzzleIntegration always calls overrideArguments() to prevent JIT compilation issues
Distributed tracing: only GuzzleIntegration injects headers (into PSR-7 request object); curl handles it natively at extension level; Psr18 relies on curl below
